idea_summary: Baseline TileLang matmul with tensor cores: 128x128x64 tiles, 3 stages, panel_si
Increase BLOCK_N to 192 for better compute intensity
BLOCK_K=128 with stages=2 to fit shared memory
Increase panel_size to 10 for L2 locality
BLOCK_M=96 not divisible by 16 for WGMMA
No swizzle hurts L2 locality badly
BLOCK_K=64 stages=3 close but lower than k128s2
BLOCK_K=32 too many inner loop iterations
64x64 tiles too small causing launch overhead
panel_size=12 close but less than panel_size=8
stages=1 no pipelining hurts perf significantly
